title: GS Paper III
subtitle: Technology, Economic Development, Bio-diversity, Environment, Security and Disaster Management

items.text: Indian Economy and issues relating to Planning, Resource Mobilization, Growth, Development, and Employment
Inclusive Growth and issues arising from it (Financial Inclusion, Poverty Alleviation, Social Sector initiatives)
Government Budgeting (Terminology, Features of outcome budgeting, Subsidies, Deficit Financing, Fiscal policy)
Taxation Structure in India, Direct/Indirect Taxes, GST Reforms, and Retrospective Taxation
Monetary Policy, Reserve Bank of India, Structure of Banking system, NPAs, and Banking Sector Reforms
Investment Models (Domestic, Foreign, FDI, FII, Public-Private Partnership - PPP models)
Infrastructure: Energy, Ports, Roads, Airports, Railways, Pipelines, and Gati Shakti Plan
Industrial Policy & Development, Phases of industrial growth, Liberalization impacts, and MSME sector
Major Crops & Cropping Patterns in various parts of the country, Irrigation types, and transport of produce
Issues related to Direct and Indirect Farm Subsidies and Minimum Support Prices (MSP), PDS objectives & working
Agricultural Marketing in India, APMC Act analysis, e-NAM, and supply chain constraints
Land Reforms in India since independence (Zamindari abolition, tenancy reforms, ceiling legislations)
Food processing and related industries in India (Scope, Significance, Location, Upstream/Downstream requirements)
Economics of animal-rearing and technological interventions (Biotech-KISAN, e-technology for farmers)
Science & Technology developments and their applications in everyday life, Indigenization of technology
Achievements of Indians in Science & Technology, Nobel Laureates, and research institutions
Awareness in fields of IT, Space, Computers, Robotics, Nanotechnology, Biotechnology, and issues relating to Intellectual Property Rights (IPR)
Space S&T: Orbits, Launch Vehicles (PSLV, GSLV, SSLV), Space Missions (Chandrayaan, Gaganyaan, Aditya L1)
Defence S&T: Missile Systems (Ballistic, Cruise), Integrated Guided Missile Program, Cyber/Drone technologies
Nuclear Energy: Nuclear reactions, Reactors (Pressurized Heavy Water Reactors, Fast Breeder Reactors), Policy of India
Conservation, Environmental Pollution and Degradation (Air, Water, Soil, Plastic Waste, E-Waste)
Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) process and legislative backing
Climate Change, UNFCCC/COP goals, Montreal Protocol, Paris Agreement, and Carbon Farming
Disaster Management: Natural & Man-made Disasters, Vulnerability Profile of India, Sendai Framework
NDMA, NDMP, NDRF role, and disaster mitigation strategies (Earthquakes, Floods, Cyclones, Landslides)
Linkages between Development and Spread of Extremism (Naxalism/Left-Wing Extremism)
Role of External State and Non-State Actors in creating challenges to Internal Security (Terrorism, Insurgency in NE)
Challenges to Internal Security through Communication Networks, Role of Media and Social Networking, Cyber Security basics, Money Laundering
Security challenges in Border areas, Border Management (maritime, land borders, fence systems), and Organized Crime linkages
Various Security Forces and Agencies and their Mandate (Assam Rifles, BSF, ITBP, CISF, CRPF, NSG)
